world_assessment: The dominant story this week is the GME/WallStreetBets short squeeze — a market structure event driven by retail coordination via Reddit, not fundamentals. Robinhood's trading restrictions on meme stocks (GME, AMC, NOK) raise regulatory and platform risk questions for fintech/brokerage names. This is noise for our portfolio but introduces broader market volatility. More relevant: chipmakers are actively reallocating wafer capacity to ease the automotive chip shortage (Global Times), directly confirming the structural nature of our semiconductor thesis. Crown Castle's expanded 5G small cell deal with Verizon confirms ongoing capex burden, supporting our VZ short. Barron's Roundtable featured both DE and NEE as picks — external validation of two positions. The macro backdrop is unchanged: Blue Wave stimulus is being legislated, clean energy mandates advancing. GME chaos is a distraction; our theses are fundamentally intact.

thesis_updates.notes: Semiconductor wafer reallocation news confirms the shortage is structural and pervasive. However, technicals have deteriorated sharply: ADX=13 (trend collapsed from prior 52), below SMA50, MACD bearish, OBV falling. ARK continued buying NVDA this week which provides some institutional support. This is a momentum lull, not a thesis break — the AI/data center demand story has not changed. Hold. Watch for ADX recovery above 25 to confirm trend resumption.

Down 10.2% from entry but clean energy thesis fully intact. RSI=50, MACD bearish are short-term headwinds. Critically: OBV rising and ADX=29 — institutional accumulation continuing despite price weakness. Lesson 3 applies directly: thesis intact, OBV positive = hold, not exit. Biden agenda advancing. Hold.

Best performer at +6.7%. Chipmaker wafer reallocation news directly confirms TSMC as the irreplaceable chokepoint. ADX=50 (strong), OBV rising — institutional trend robust. MACD bearish is minor near-term noise against a dominant trend. Thesis strengthening.
Thesis intact. DRAM/NAND shortage persists. ADX=46 confirms strong trend. MACD bearish is a short-term concern. OBV flat — monitoring for deterioration. Semiconductor super-cycle thesis unchanged.
Slightly negative but constructive. Barron's Roundtable featured NEE as a pick — external thesis validation. MACD bullish, OBV rising. ADX=22 moderate. Biden clean energy agenda executing. Hold.

RSI=27 is technically oversold; expect a short-term bounce. However ADX=30, OBV falling, near lower BB — the structural downtrend is intact. Hold short through any bounce; invalidation is RSI recovery above 50 with volume confirming.
Flat at +0.4%. OBV rising confirms institutional accumulation. ADX=27 moderate. MACD bearish is near-term noise. Hyperscaler networking silicon demand continues. Thesis intact.

Down 2.0% but Barron's Roundtable featured DE as a pick this week — direct external validation of the Blue Wave agricultural/infrastructure thesis. ADX=34, above SMA50. OBV flat is worth monitoring. Hold.

Down 4.1% from entry but technicals are constructive: MACD bullish, ADX=39, OBV rising — institutional accumulation. 'Electric Vehicles Are On Fire' headline validates EV theme. Lesson 3 applies: thesis intact with OBV rising = hold. Target $16 unchanged.

Stopped out at $268. Realized loss ~-8.7% on position. Current price $274.73 — stop was correct as OBV is still falling and MACD bearish. Financial Re-rating thesis remains structurally valid but GS corrected with the broader financials sector. May revisit after sector stabilizes. The stop protected us from further losses.

new_positions.thesis: Palantir is the leading AI-powered data analytics platform bridging government intelligence and enterprise operations — the perfect intersection of our AI/Technology theme and Blue Wave Fiscal Stimulus theme. Biden's government expansion (defense, public health infrastructure, intelligence modernization) drives direct demand for Palantir's Gotham platform, which has multi-year government contracts providing revenue visibility. Enterprise Foundry adoption is accelerating as corporations seek AI/ML on proprietary datasets — a structural trend independent of any administration. Unlike pure-play software companies, Palantir builds deeply embedded systems that are nearly impossible to rip out once deployed (high switching costs). The Blue Wave delivering larger federal budgets is directly accretive to PLTR's largest revenue segment. Technically: RSI=61 (momentum without overextension), ADX=42 (strong confirmed institutional trend), MACD bullish, OBV rising — all four signals aligned for a clean entry on confirmed trend strength.
new_positions.invalidation: Government contract pipeline deteriorates or major contract loss announced. Enterprise Foundry growth decelerates below 20% YoY. ADX falls below 25 with OBV turning consistently negative. Revenue growth misses by >10% two consecutive quarters.
new_positions.timing_note: RSI=61, ADX=42 confirmed strong trend, MACD bullish, OBV rising — entering on institutional momentum confirmation, not at an extended peak

theme_updates.name: Financial Re-rating
theme_updates.reason: GS stopped out and the entire financial sector is showing institutional distribution: JPM OBV falling, GS OBV falling, V OBV falling, MA OBV falling, SCHW OBV falling. The structural Blue Wave thesis for financials remains valid but the market is not re-rating this sector yet. Near-term headwinds from the retail trading chaos (regulatory risk for brokerages, Robinhood restrictions) are creating uncertainty. Reducing conviction from 4 to 3 until sector OBV stabilizes.

lessons: Short squeeze risk in heavily-shorted stocks is violent and existential for short positions: the GME/WallStreetBets event demonstrates that coordinated retail buying can force institutional short covers at catastrophic prices regardless of fundamental thesis. Before opening any short: verify (1) short float is not >15-20%, (2) no unusual options open interest suggesting gamma squeeze setup, (3) no active retail/social media cult following. Our VZ short is in a large-cap with diverse institutional holders — safe. Never short small/mid-cap stocks with high retail ownership and elevated short float.

lesson_updates.reason: ENPH is down 10.2% from entry — exactly the scenario this lesson addresses. OBV is rising and ADX=29, meaning institutional accumulation continues despite price weakness. The correct action per Lesson 3 is hold, not exit. We are holding. This week provided a live test of the principle and we applied it correctly.

weekly_summary: Week of Feb 1, 2021: GameStop/Reddit short squeeze dominated headlines but is noise for our fundamental positions. GS stopped out (-8.7% realized loss on that position). Semiconductor Infrastructure thesis strengthened by chipmaker wafer reallocation news. Opened PLTR (5%) as AI/government data analytics play at the intersection of AI Technology and Blue Wave themes — strong technical entry with ADX=42, OBV rising. Financial Re-rating theme reduced to 3/5 as entire financial sector showing institutional distribution despite intact macro thesis. VZ short working (+5.4%), Crown Castle deal confirms ongoing capex burden. Barron's Roundtable validated DE and NEE independently. Portfolio +4.2% vs SPX +0.2% — maintaining significant benchmark outperformance. Cash at ~49% post-PLTR deployment.
